dimensions.criterion: Resolved exactly one topic from the enum; sequenced prerequisites when two applied; asked one question when genuinely ambiguous; never invented a topic or edited routes.
dimensions.pass: One playbook read, correct topic, prerequisite order respected.
dimensions.fail: Multiple playbooks loaded, wrong topic, or topic invented outside enum.

dimensions.criterion: For email-sending: SPF/DKIM/DMARC published, DMARC ramped from none, suppression on bounce/complaint, one-click List-Unsubscribe-Post, queued idempotent sends, no PII in logs.
dimensions.pass: All authentication + reputation + compliance gates met with evidence.
dimensions.fail: p=reject before alignment, no suppression, or inline blocking send.

dimensions.criterion: For template topics: table layout with role=presentation, 100% inline CSS, <=600px single-column mobile, alt on all images, AA contrast, <100KB, Outlook MSO/VML fixes, dark-mode legible.
dimensions.pass: Renders acceptably across Gmail/Outlook/Apple Mail and images-off.
dimensions.fail: div/flex layout, head-only CSS, >100KB clip, or unstyled mobile.

dimensions.criterion: For newsletter-design: one job-to-be-done and one primary CTA, subject+preheader paired, UTMs on every link, judged by CTOR not opens, metrics vs baseline, opt-in list hygiene.
dimensions.pass: Clear CTA, instrumented links, CTOR-led measurement plan.
dimensions.fail: Multiple co-equal CTAs, no UTMs, or open-rate optimized in isolation.

dimensions.criterion: Every claim carries an Alfa core EN tag ([DOC]/[INFERENCE]/[CODE]/[CONFIG]/[ASSUMPTION]); no Jarvis {…} tags; single brand per output; no invented prices; Validate phase actually ran.
dimensions.pass: Full tag coverage, single brand, green only with evidence.
dimensions.fail: Untagged claims, mixed tag families, or green-as-success.
